description: Panko Studio simplified palette — five colors only (matches src/index.css)

page.usage: Petal — page background, nav CTA text, footer body text

card.usage: White — card surfaces, primary CTA text

blush.usage: Blush — badge backgrounds, card borders, featured AI card, section tints

shrimp.usage: Shrimp — buttons, links, accents, focus rings
